input_text: Added the new /api/posts endpoint. Wired up the handler, the validator, and the storage call. Wrote 4 tests covering happy path, missing-field error, too-long-title error, and unauthorized. All green. Ran lint and mypy, both clean. Committed and pushed. PR open at #142.
reviewer_notes: Pure implementation session with no decisions. Demonstrates the 'expected no output' case.
